name: forks-workflow
description: Test SPI forks skill — three-branch strategy, sync, cascade, conflict resolution

steps.name: three-branch-knowledge
steps.prompt: explain how the three-branch strategy works for SPI service forks

steps.name: sync-operations
steps.prompt: check the sync status across all 8 SPI fork repos

assertions.description: Uses gh CLI to check sync across repos

steps.name: conflict-resolution
steps.prompt: there's a merge conflict in fork_integration for osdu-spi-storage, how do I resolve it?

steps.name: cascade-workflow
steps.prompt: how do I trigger a manual cascade for osdu-spi-partition?

steps.name: boundary-test-iac
steps.prompt: deploy my SPI environment with azd up
